title: Downloadable
description: Browse and download mods, resource packs, shaders, and worlds in-game.
body:
# **Downloadable** # 
**Tired of manually downloading mods and placing them in the right folders—along with resource packs, datapacks, worlds, and shaders?**

This mod lets you download mods, resource packs, shaders, and worlds directly in-game quickly.
No more switching between websites.

**It support curseforge and modrinth mods.**

## Fabric api is needed for the fabric version

[![Support me on Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/moaierdev)


![Downloadable](https://image2url.com/r2/default/images/1767436506631-dae36bcd-eb51-400f-8352-dcb45d6f3b97.gif)
